cards.name: Obliterate
cards.description: this card obliterates.
cards.action: target.takeHit(1000, mission);mission.gameState.setAllVariableValues([{variable:'n', start:0, end:-1, local:false, value:false},{variable:'l', start:0, end:-1, local:false, value:false},{variable:'t', start:0, end:-1, local:false, value:false},{variable:'s', start:0, end:-1, local:false, value:false}]);
cards.comment: deals 1000 dmg to everything. Resets board -> everything to false or !#F(s|l|t|n)
